panels.title: Max Overload Stage
panels.description: Red immediately if any worker enters overload stage > 0.

panels.title: 5xx Error % (5m)
panels.description: 5xx percentage over the last 5 minutes. Red above 0.1%.

panels.title: POST /messages p95
panels.description: Current p95 POST /api/v1/messages latency.

panels.title: WS Replay Timeout Rate
panels.description: Any non-zero timeout replay rate should stand out immediately.

panels.title: PG Pool Waiting Across Workers
panels.description: Queue depth waiting for PG clients. Alert threshold is 8.

panels.title: PG Circuit Breaker Reject Rate
panels.description: Immediate rejects when DB checkout pressure crosses the breaker.

panels.title: PG Operation Error Rate by Reason
panels.description: Especially watch acquire_timeout versus connection/shutdown/other.

panels.title: POST /messages Responses by Status
panels.description: Stacked rate of POST /api/v1/messages responses. 503 spikes should be obvious.

panels.title: POST /messages Latency p95 / p99
panels.description: Histogram p95/p99 specifically for POST /api/v1/messages.

panels.title: Overload Stage per Worker
panels.description: Shows load-shedding stage per app worker.

panels.title: WS Replay Query Rate by Result
panels.description: Reconnect replay outcomes, especially timeout versus ok.

panels.title: WS Outbound Queue Block Waits
panels.description: Times message-priority enqueues had to wait for bounded queue capacity.

panels.title: WS Backpressure Events by Action
panels.description: Dropped vs killed sockets due to WS send backpressure.

panels.title: WS Disconnect Rate by Close Code
panels.description: Abnormal disconnects (1006) should stand out.

panels.title: WS Reconnect Rate by Window
panels.description: Reconnects bucketed by reconnect gap window.

panels.title: Fanout Publish p95 by Path/Stage
panels.description: Global fanout stage latency, useful for spotting conversation_dm publish slowdowns.

panels.title: Fanout Target Cache Rate
panels.description: Hit/miss/coalesced outcomes for realtime fanout target caches.

panels.title: Endpoint List Cache Rate
panels.description: Cache outcomes for communities/channels/messages/conversations list endpoints.

panels.title: Conversation Fanout Cache Version Retry Rate
panels.description: Retry and uncached_return indicate cache version races under load.

panels.title: conversation_dm Fanout Publish p95 by Stage
panels.description: p95 for each conversation_dm fanout stage.

panels.title: conversation_dm Fanout Publish p99 by Stage
panels.description: p99 for each conversation_dm fanout stage.

panels.title: Event Loop Lag p99 per Worker
panels.description: Default prom-client event loop p99 metric per worker.

panels.title: RSS Memory per Worker
panels.description: Resident memory per worker against a 500MB threshold.

panels.title: HTTP Request Rate vs Aborted Rate
panels.description: Completed versus aborted HTTP request rates.

panels.title: Redis Ping ms from Capacity Snapshots (Loki)
panels.description: Log-based panel from structured capacity_snapshot events because redis_ping_ms is not a Prometheus metric.

panels.title: DB Host iowait % (node exporter)
panels.description: Host-level DB disk iowait from node exporter if available.

panels.title: WS Replay Query p95 / p99 by Result
panels.description: Reconnect replay outcomes, especially timeout versus ok.

panels.title: WS Replay Fail-Open Rate by Reason
panels.description: Reconnect replay outcomes, especially timeout versus ok.

panels.title: WS Replay Inflight by VM
panels.description: Reconnect replay outcomes, especially timeout versus ok.

panels.title: PG Pool Waiting by VM
panels.description: Reconnect replay outcomes, especially timeout versus ok.
